issue_summary: bin/post (and SimplePostTool in -Dauto=yes mode) now sends rather than skips files without a known content type, as application/octet-stream, provided it still is in the allowed filetypes setting
javadoc_before:
/**
   * Guesses the type of a file, based on file name suffix
   * @param file the file
   * @return the content-type guessed
   */
javadoc_after:
/**
   * Guesses the type of a file, based on file name suffix
   * Returns "application/octet-stream" if no corresponding mimeMap type.
   * @param file the file
   * @return the content-type guessed
   */
